session.user: Run prettier --check on these two files and report results: - docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md - docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier on those two files to check formatting.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on two markdown files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style! session.assistant: prettier passed: Both files use Prettier code style. All matched files are properly formatted.
